expenses.title: Expenses

expenses.equivalentHint: How much {currency} does this payment cover?

expenses.editDescription: Update the details of this expense.
expenses.countabilizeHint: If disabled, it is saved as a reminder and does not affect totals or reports.
expenses.enterValidAmountForConversion: Enter a valid amount and base rate to calculate the conversion.
expenses.enterValidAmountBeforeConversion: Enter a valid amount before calculating the conversion.
expenses.emptySearchDescription: No expenses found for that criteria.

accountAmount.mustBePositive: Account amount must be greater than 0.
accountAmount.required: Account amount is required for selected account currency.

categories.title: Categories
categories.createSubtitle: Add a category to the project
categories.emptyDescription: Create categories to organize your expenses
categories.deleteConfirmDescriptionNamed: Delete category "{name}"? Expenses in this category will move to General.

delete.title: Delete category
delete.confirm: Delete category "{name}"? Expenses in this category will move to General.

categories.emptySearchDescription: No categories found matching your search.
categories.editDescription: Update the details of this category.

obligations.title: Obligations
obligations.emptyDescription: Record debts or financial commitments for the project
obligations.emptySearchDescription: No obligations match the selected filter.
obligations.editDescription: Update the details of this obligation.

budget.subtitle: Set the maximum amount for the project and when you want to receive a usage alert
budget.totalAmountHint: Total amount available to cover all project expenses
budget.alertPercentHint: Example: 80 means alert when 80% of the budget has been spent
budget.deleteDescription: The project will no longer have a general expense limit.
budget.deleteConfirm: Delete the budget configured for this project?

delete.title: Delete budget
delete.description: The project will no longer have a general expense limit.
delete.confirm: Delete the budget configured for this project?

empty.description: Set a budget to track how much you have spent on this project.
empty.viewerHint: Only owners and editors can configure the budget.

panel.title: Project budget
panel.exceededBy: The project exceeds the budget by {currency} {amount}. Consider adjusting the limit or reducing new expenses.
panel.thresholdReachedPrefix: You have reached the alert threshold. There are

normal.title: Healthy execution
normal.detail: Spending is below the configured alert threshold.

warning.title: Approaching threshold
warning.detail: The budget is near the alert limit; it is advisable to monitor the pace.

critical.title: High consumption
critical.detail: The percentage used is critical and may compromise the remaining margin.

exceeded.title: Budget exceeded
exceeded.detail: Total spending has exceeded the budget configured for the project.

partnerSettlements.title: Partner settlements
partnerSettlements.createSubtitle: Record a direct payment between two partners
partnerSettlements.revertWarning: This action will revert the settlement's effect on the balance.

delete.title: Delete settlement
delete.revertWarning: This action will revert the settlement's effect on the balance.

partnerSettlements.emptyDescription: Record direct payments between project partners
partnerSettlements.noPartnersTitle: No partners assigned to the project
partnerSettlements.noPartnersHint: Assign partners from the Settings tab to view balances and settlements.
partnerSettlements.warningsDesc: Alternative currency totals may be incomplete. Edit the affected transactions and add exchange rates.
partnerSettlements.enterValidAmountForConversion: Enter a valid amount to calculate the conversion.
partnerSettlements.historyDescription: Transactions with splits and settlements for this partner.
partnerSettlements.suggestionsDescription: Minimum transfers to bring all balances to zero.

validation.fromPartnerRequired: Select the partner making the payment
validation.toPartnerRequired: Select the partner receiving the payment

assign.title: Assign partner
assign.description: Select a partner to assign to the project. Their accounts will be available automatically.

empty.noPartners: You have no partners created. Create one from the Partners section.
empty.allAssigned: All your partners are already assigned to this project.

list.removeDisabledTitle: Has payment methods linked to the project. Unlink them first.

empty.title: No partners assigned
empty.ownerDescription: Assign a partner to the project so their accounts are available.
empty.viewerDescription: The project owner has not assigned any partners yet.

link.title: Link payment method
link.description: Select a payment method to link to the project.
link.empty: All your payment methods are already linked.

movementDetail.splitsInfo: This movement has splits. Open the editor to view them in detail.

splitSection.title: Splits by partner
splitSection.percentageDescription: Assign the percentage of {currency} each partner covers. The total must be 100%.
splitSection.fixedDescription: Assign the amount in {currency} each partner covers.
splitSection.errorFixed: The total must equal the original amount.

currencyConversion.requiredHint: You must complete one conversion for each alternative currency configured in the project.
currencyConversion.optionalHint: No alternative currencies are linked to the project. Configure them in the Currencies tab to enable conversions.

documentExtraction.dropZoneHint: PDF, JPG, PNG, WEBP — up to 10 MB

errors.invalidFile: Invalid file or could not extract information from the document.
errors.planLimit: Your plan does not allow OCR or you have reached the monthly limit.
errors.forbidden: You do not have edit permissions on this project.
errors.generic: Could not extract data from the document.
errors.noFile: Select an image or PDF to extract data.
errors.unsupportedFormat: Unsupported format. Use PDF or a valid image.

bulkImport.pastePrompt: Click here and paste your data (Ctrl+V / Cmd+V)
bulkImport.splitRequiresProjectAmount: Fill the converted amount to auto-distribute splits
bulkImport.noDataPasted: No valid data detected from clipboard

formatGuide.title: Expected table format
formatGuide.subtitle: Copy cells directly from Excel or Google Sheets. Recommended column order:
formatGuide.tip: The first row can be headers: Title, Amount, Date, Description

parse.noTabs: The pasted text doesn't look like spreadsheet data. Make sure to copy cells directly from Excel or Google Sheets.
parse.noUsableColumns: No valid column detected. Make sure the table has title or amount columns.
parse.noUsableRows: No rows with valid data found
parse.missingTitles: More than 75% of rows have no title. Check the column order.

warn.manyMissingAmounts: More than 50% of rows have no amount — you can fill them in manually
warn.manyMissingDates: More than 50% of rows have no date — you can fill them in manually

validation.minOneItem: You must add at least one transaction
validation.splitsMustSum100: The sum of splits must equal 100%
validation.splitsMustSumAmount: The sum of splits must equal the converted amount ({amount})
validation.splitsRequired: Splits are required — fill in the amounts and make sure they sum to 100%
validation.splitsRequiredInRows: Rows {rows}: splits are required — fill in amounts summing to 100%
validation.rowsWithErrors: Rows with errors: {rows} — check highlighted fields
validation.splitCEMissingInRows: Rows {rows}: missing alternative currency amounts for split partners
